productDisplayName: Puma Ess Sweat Pants Track Pant
description: Composition Black track pants made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester, has a comfortable elastic waistband with a drawstring, mesh panel on the inner, two pockets on the sides and an embroidered puma Jumping cat below the left pocket   Fitting Comfort   Wash care Hand or machine wash inside out at 30 degrees with like colours, using a mild detergent Tumble dry or dry in shade Warm iron on reverse   Get cosy this winter and enjoy those heated runs in the early morning mist in this pair of track pants from puma. Created using a cotton-polyester fabric, this piece of clothing wicks sweat away and keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with t-shirts and sports shoes to suit your comfort and style.   Model statistics The model wears track pants of length 40" Height: 6& rdquo , Waist: 32& rdquo
